# JSON Schemas

Every typed contract crossing a stage boundary in Agentic ALZ is a JSON Schema in [`schemas/`](../../schemas/). This page is generated from those files.

## `decision.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/decision.schema.json`
- **Title**: Agentic ALZ research decision record

Typed shape for `decision/<id>/decision.json`, produced by the `10-research-and-decide.md` playbook. Each architectural decision touching a sensitive surface lives in its own folder: one markdown per allow-listed frontier model, one rubric, one `decision.json` aggregating the verdicts, and one ADR link. Round-trip-tested by `orchestrator/tests/test_decision_schema.py`.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `schema_version` | `string` | ✓ | Constant: `1`. |
| `id` | `string` | ✓ | Stable slug; the folder name under decision/. Pattern: `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$`. |
| `title` | `string` | ✓ | Imperative one-liner. |
| `problem` | `string` | ✓ | What forced the decision; what is the worst case if we get it wrong. |
| `options` | array of `object` | ✓ | The mutually-exclusive options under consideration. At least two options must be present, otherwise no decision is being made. |
| `criteria` | array of `object` | ✓ | Rubric criteria each model is asked to score; same shape as docs/multi-model-judge.md. |
| `verdicts` | array of `object` | ✓ | One entry per allow-listed frontier model that voted. Must include >= 2 distinct providers per docs/multi-model-judge.md. |
| `outcome` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `adr` | `object` | ✓ |  |


## `design.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/design.schema.json`
- **Title**: Agentic ALZ design

Typed output of the Design stage. Consumed by the Generate stage. The Design LLM may produce only fields defined here; any extra keys cause a hard validation failure.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `schema_version` | `string` | ✓ | Constant: `1`. |
| `inputs_sha` | `string` | ✓ | SHA-256 of the inputs.yaml that produced this design. Pattern: `^[0-9a-f]{64}$`. |
| `topology` | `string` | ✓ | Enum: `['hub-and-spoke', 'vwan']`. |
| `modules` | array of `object` | ✓ |  |
| `decisions` | array of `object` | ✓ |  |
| `adr_markdown` | `string` | ✓ | Rendered ADR using docs/adr-template.md. |


## `inputs.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/inputs.schema.json`
- **Title**: Agentic ALZ inputs

Minimal interview output for the Agentic ALZ pipeline. Hand-editing this file is a first-class supported path.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `schema_version` | `string` | ✓ | Constant: `1`. |
| `org` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `tenant` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `management_groups` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `platform_subscriptions` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `regions` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `connectivity` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `logging` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `policy_baseline` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `naming` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `tags` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `budgets` | `object` |   |  |
| `break_glass` | `object` |   |  |


## `rcg.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/rcg.schema.json`
- **Title**: Typed Azure Firewall Rule Collection Group

Provider-neutral, typed representation of a Rule Collection Group (RCG). Used by the Firewall Composer LLM stage and by the (future) MCP-driven firewall importer to round-trip rules between Azure live state and the alz-firewall-policy/lib/ working tree without ever pasting raw Azure JSON into Terraform.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `schema_version` | `string` | ✓ | Constant: `1`. |
| `name` | `string` | ✓ | RCG name; lowercase kebab-case, 3-63 chars. Pattern: `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{1,61}[a-z0-9]$`. |
| `description` | `string` |   |  |
| `priority` | `integer` | ✓ | RCG priority within the policy (Azure Firewall valid range). |
| `rule_collections` | array of `rule_collection` | ✓ |  |


## `risk.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/risk.schema.json`
- **Title**: Agentic ALZ risk report

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `schema_version` | `string` | ✓ | Constant: `1`. |
| `plan_sha` | `string` | ✓ | Pattern: `^[0-9a-f]{64}$`. |
| `score` | `number` | ✓ | (destroyed + replaced) * env_weight + scaled cost delta + flag penalties. |
| `weight` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `counts` | `object` | ✓ |  |
| `infracost_delta_usd` | `number` | ✓ |  |
| `flags` | array of `string` | ✓ |  |
| `requires_second_reviewer` | `boolean` | ✓ |  |
| `blocks_auto_apply` | `boolean` | ✓ | True for any platform-scope change in v1 (autonomous apply is non-goal). |
| `summary_markdown` | `string` |   |  |


## `roadmap.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/roadmap.schema.json`
- **Title**: Agentic ALZ roadmap item

Shape of a single roadmap item parsed by scripts/squad_bootstrap.py from ROADMAP.md. Each item becomes a GitHub issue keyed by the marker `<!-- roadmap-id: {id} -->`. Items with `agent_eligible: true` and all `depends_on` closed are auto-assigned to the Copilot cloud agent.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `id` | `string` | ✓ | Stable, unique slug used as the idempotency key in the issue marker. Pattern: `^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$`. |
| `title` | `string` | ✓ | Issue title; should be imperative and self-contained. |
| `milestone` | `string` | ✓ | Milestone the issue belongs to. Bootstrap script ensures it exists. |
| `summary` | `string` | ✓ | One-paragraph context for the work item. |
| `acceptance_criteria` | array of `string` | ✓ | Bullet list of verifiable acceptance criteria. |
| `labels` | array of `string` | ✓ | Labels to apply (and create if missing). Conventionally area:* and type:*. |
| `agent_eligible` | `boolean` | ✓ | If true, the bootstrap script assigns @copilot when all `depends_on` are closed and no `human-only` label is present. Defaults to false to keep destructive/sensitive work human-driven. |
| `depends_on` | array of `string` |   | Other roadmap ids that must be closed before this item is eligible for auto-assignment. |
| `repo` | `string` |   | Reserved for future fan-out to sibling repos (alz-platform, alz-firewall-policy, alz-workloads/*). When omitted, defaults to the current repo. Pattern: `^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$`. |
| `playbook` | `string` |   | Filename (no path) of the docs/playbooks/ entry that governs the work item. When omitted, scripts/squad_bootstrap.py.derive_playbook derives a default from labels in this precedence order: area:firewall -> 07-firewall-lib-exemplar.md, area:ci -> 08-ci-workflow-change.md, area:llm/area:prompts/area:schemas -> 04-prompt-or-schema-change.md, area:security -> 05-policy-change.md, area:terraform/area:bicep -> 06-iac-template-change.md, area:operate -> 02-bug-fix.md, area:bootstrap -> 08-ci-workflow-change.md, type:docs -> 03-doc-only.md. Fallback is 00-task-router.md. Pattern: `^[0-9]{2}-[a-z0-9-]+\.md$`. |


## `versions.lock.schema.json`

- **`$id`**: `https://github.com/martinopedal/agentic-alz/schemas/versions.lock.schema.json`
- **Title**: AVM versions.lock

Allowlist of approved Terraform module sources and exact versions. Every module in a generated template must appear here. Enforced by policies/avm_pinning.rego.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `schema_version` | `string` | ✓ | Constant: `1`. |
| `modules` | array of `object` | ✓ |  |
